CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2025 Continued To Jan-07-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-07-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. Daniel Feder, Esq. of Law Offices of Daniel Feder (tel: 415-391-9476) for the Plaintiff.
Atty. Rose-Ellen Fairgrieve, Esq. of Fairgrieve Law Office (tel: 415-890-6057) for the Defendants.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANTS SSA ARCHITECTURE & PLANNING, INC., AND SALLY SWANSON ARCHITECT, INC.'s DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT.

Matter argued and submitted. Upon conclusion, the Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Court reporter: Brianna Rudd, CSR# 13668 (tel: 209-747-1306 / email: briannarudd@gmail.com). (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2025 Continued To Nov-05-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-12-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANTS SSA ARCHITECTURE & PLANNING, INC., AND SALLY SWANSON ARCHITECT, INC.'s DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff T. Dorius has submitted a late-filed opposition. The declaration in support of SSA Architecture & Planning Inc. et al.'s demurrer demonstrates that Defendants' counsel attempted multiple meet and confer efforts to which Plaintiff's counsel did not respond. The court orders Plaintiff's counsel to comply with the meet and confer obligations of CCP 430.41, which requires that the parties conduct a meet and confer in person, or by telephone or video conference. The court orders the demurrer off calendar and extends the time for defendants to respond to the complaint to September 12, 2025.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

Off Calendar Jun-18-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SSA ARCHITECTURE & PLANNING, INC., SALLY SWANSON ARCHITECT, INC. DEMURRER to COMPLAINT

Off calendar. Amended complaint filed.

Visiting Judge: John True; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/JT)
